title: EDEN experiment runtime object
description: Observed runtime state of an EDEN experiment, distinct from the declarative experiment-config (experiment-config.schema.json). Carries the lifecycle state field introduced in 12a-3 (spec/v0/02-data-model.md §2.5). The split mirrors task vs task-payload: declarative input lives in the config, observed runtime in the experiment object.

name.description: OPTIONAL operator-supplied display label (spec/v0/02-data-model.md §1.7). The `pattern`-inexpressible rules (NFC normalization, Unicode-category exclusions, no leading/trailing whitespace) are carried by `format: display-name`.

state.description: Lifecycle state per 02-data-model.md §2.5. Default at creation is 'running'; the transition to 'terminated' is one-way in v0.

created_at.description: Wall-clock time at which the experiment was created. Used by deployment-supplied termination policies (e.g. max_wall_time) and not constrained beyond ISO-8601 UTC.

base_commit_sha.description: The experiment seed commit on main, recorded at registration / repo-init time (spec/v0/02-data-model.md §2.5). The orchestrator reads this per experiment to create the kind=='baseline' variant (§9.4); both single- and multi-experiment modes read it via read_experiment. Absent (never JSON null) on experiments registered before this field existed; such experiments never acquire a baseline.

imported_from.description: Provenance of the experiment when it was imported from a portable checkpoint (spec/v0/10-checkpoints.md §10). Absent (or JSON null) on natively-created experiments; present on experiments produced by the import endpoint (07-wire-protocol.md §14.2). Recovery probe: a client that lost the import 201 response queries this field and matches checkpoint_exported_at against the local manifest's exported_at.

checkpoint_exported_at.description: The source checkpoint's manifest.exported_at value, copied verbatim at import time.

checkpoint_format_version.description: The source checkpoint's manifest.checkpoint_format_version value, copied verbatim at import time.

source_experiment_id.description: OPTIONAL export-side experiment_id of the source experiment, stamped when the receiver minted a fresh exp_* on import (no as_experiment_id override). Provenance only — never reused as the primary key (spec/v0/10-checkpoints.md §10).
